decision_title: Decide canonical availability table shape and status enum
current_evidence_summary: Confident subset has available/standard/not_available values; target availability schema present=False.
recommended_default: conservative_starting_point: preserve one row per selectable plus variant_id in first prototype.
required_human_decision: Choose the canonical availability table shape and confirm the status enum.
notes: Do not broaden availability or fill missing variants here.

decision_title: Confirm first apply boundary before any canonical mutation
current_evidence_summary: Pass 15 recommends selectables/display/availability from confident subset only, with exclusions preserved.
recommended_default: conservative_starting_point: produce a reconciliation report against canonical CSV before apply.
required_human_decision: Confirm whether a future apply prototype may proceed within the stated boundary.
notes: No apply is authorized by this packet.

current_evidence_summary: Proposal-only metadata is useful for review but is not canonical business data.
recommended_default: conservative_starting_point: preserve metadata in generated archive/import audit only.
required_human_decision: Approve which proposal metadata is dropped, archived, or mapped to provenance after apply.
notes: These fields must not be copied into canonical business tables blindly.

decision_title: Decide how section_family maps to canonical section_id / step_id / category_id
current_evidence_summary: section_family is too broad to be final section_id; Pass 15 marks it as requiring mapping.
recommended_default: conservative_starting_point: use an explicit import map for section_family to UI taxonomy before apply.
required_human_decision: Approve the section, step, and category mapping approach.
notes: Do not infer fine categories from descriptions in this decision packet.

decision_title: Decide how proposal_selectable_id maps to final canonical selectable_id
current_evidence_summary: proposal_selectable_id is proposal-only and not canonical truth; Pass 15 marks it transform_required.
recommended_default: conservative_starting_point: keep proposal_selectable_id as review-only until a canonical ID policy is approved.
required_human_decision: Choose the canonical selectable_id policy for any future apply.
notes: No final canonical IDs are generated by this packet.

decision_title: Decide how row-level source refs map into canonical governance/source traceability
current_evidence_summary: Confident subset source refs are row-level evidence; target meta/source_refs.csv present=False.
recommended_default: conservative_starting_point: keep source refs as import evidence until governance shape is approved.
required_human_decision: Choose whether source refs become canonical rows, a membership relation, or import-only evidence.
notes: Missing canonical source_refs schema is a schema-context gap, not an importer failure.
